name: Ben Woodall
awards: Budget Excellence Award, Project Efficiency Recognition
bio: Ben leads projects with a full-lifecycle mindset, coordinating planning, budgeting, and execution to keep teams and clients aligned at every phase. His calm problem-solving approach helps prevent surprises in the field and supports reliable delivery on schedule and scope.
careerHighlights: Leads projects from preconstruction planning through turnover execution.
Aligns budget, schedule, and scope to reduce downstream project risk.
Coordinates stakeholders early to prevent field-level friction and delays.
Delivers predictable outcomes through proactive issue management.
funFact: Ben takes pride in building projects his family can point to for years to come.
certifications: ADDA Certified Mechanical and Architectural Drafter, OSHA 30, Procore Certified
